summary: Started with: Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out. | Outcome: Got it. I'm caught up. Last real work was the Still Mode debugging sprint on March 22. The app was fixed and ready for your testing. The context says "continue where you left off"

highlights.text: Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

Got it. I'm caught up. Last real work was the Still Mode debugging sprint on March 22. The app was fixed and ready for your testing. The context says "continue where you left off" and "previous model attempt failed or timed out" — that suggests something was in-flight when it died. But I don't see a half-finished task in the memory files. **What was the previous attempt trying to do?** Options based on context: 1. **Still Mode testing/signing** — final test, code signing, notarization, Gumroad setup 2. **Paper Trader/Tuque launch** — trading bots, target was Monday March 24 3. **Something else you kicked off** that got interrupted What were you working on when it timed out?
